about.title: About Dye Harmony
about.p1: Dye Harmony is a tool that suggests FFXIV dye (colorant) combinations based on color theory. Pick a single base color, and it instantly proposes harmonious dye combinations using complementary, analogous, triadic, and other patterns.
about.p2: Designed for players who aren't experts in color theory, it helps you discover fresh glamour and housing palettes effortlessly. All suggested dyes are obtainable in-game, so you can apply them to your glamour right away.

usage.title: How to Use
usage.step1: Pick a color pattern from the "Color Pattern" section.
usage.step2: Choose a base dye from the "Dye List".
usage.step3: A preview shows dyes that harmonize with your chosen base color.
usage.step4: Tap the heart to save a combination, or share it via the share button.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, it's completely free with no account required.
faq.q2: Are the suggested dyes actually obtainable in-game?
faq.a2: Yes. All suggestions are dyes you can obtain in FFXIV.
faq.a3: Yes. The filter at the top of the dye list lets you exclude metallics and narrow by category (red, blue, etc.).
faq.q4: Where can I see my saved combinations?
faq.a4: From the header menu, open the "Favorites" page. Your data is stored locally in your browser.
faq.q5: Is this an official Square Enix tool?
faq.a5: No, this is an unofficial tool individually developed by a player.

kasane.title: Kasane-irome | Dye Harmony
kasane.heading: Kasane-irome
kasane.description:
A traditional Heian period color technique. Different colors on the 'outer' and 'inner' sides of a garment create a translucent seasonal effect.
*Colors are approximated from FFXIV dyes. Not exact reproductions—enjoy the atmosphere!
